headlines.title: Ukraine Hits St. Petersburg With Massive Wave of Drones
headlines.description: A wave of Ukrainian drones targeted sites in St. Petersburg where Russian President Vladimir Putin is kicking off a closely-watched international summit. It comes after Ukraine suffered one of the worst onslaughts of the war. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: California governor candidates address supporters
headlines.description: Democrat Xavier Becerra and Republican Steven Hilton addressed supporters as voters took to the polls in California’s governor primary.

headlines.title: In Iowa primary for governor, Trump’s pick concedes to MAHA-backed candidate
headlines.description: Rep. Randy Feenstra conceded to businessman Zach Lahn in Iowa’s Republican primary for governor as party voters rejected President Donald Trump’s late endorsement in the race.

headlines.title: Rubio testifies at Senate hearing
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as Secretary of State Marco Rubio testifies before a Senate Appropriations Subcommittee.

headlines.title: California standoff suspect is dead and all 10 hostages are freed
headlines.description: A California man with a violent criminal history who was a registered sex offender was killed by law enforcement early Wednesday morning after barricading himself on the second floor of a Bakersfield building, where he strapped explosives to himself and several hostages.

headlines.title: CBS News’ Bari Weiss addresses ‘unfortunate’ firing of Scott Pelley
headlines.description: CBS News Editor-in-Chief Bari Weiss, speaking to network employees Wednesday about the firing of “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley, said newsroom leaders could not “find a way back” with the veteran journalist — a comment he flatly rejected in a statement of his own

headlines.title: Florida pastor and son’s $8 million Covid fraud case comes to bizarre end
headlines.description: It was one of the strangest Covid fraud cases brought by the Justice Department, with the kind of wild details that seemed ripped from a Hollywood script

headlines.title: Student who called out CBS at News Emmys says Scott Pelley ‘did the right thing’ in network upheaval
headlines.description: Moments before Santiago Campos took the stage at the News & Documentary Emmy Awards in New York City to accept a CBS News-funded scholarship in front of some of the most powerful people in TV news, veteran “60 Minutes” correspondent Scott Pelley took the time to offer the high school senior some advice.

headlines.title: After Auburn student goes missing in Japan, family fears he’s ‘emotionally distressed’
headlines.description: Auburn University student James “Weston” Higginbotham went missing in Japan, with loved ones fearing he may be “emotionally distressed.”

headlines.title: Navy vet charged with murder after attack on man known for pro-Trump displays
From The Sports Desk: Vegas stuns Carolina in Game 1 to open Stanley Cup Final
headlines.description: The NBA Finals are finally here, and what a matchup we have.

headlines.title: FAA probes close call between JetBlue plane and aircraft near Fort Lauderdale Airport
headlines.description: The JetBlue plane received an onboard alert warning about another nearby aircraft that was “not in communications with air traffic control,” according to the FAA.
